original_image_tags: Aged, yellowed paper with a torn upper-left corner and two punch holes at the top. The paper contains heavily faded, illegible typed text and several stamped markings in blue ink at the bottom.

elements.description: Multiple ink stamps and handwritten annotations on a blank or typed text page. Visible stamps include 'RECEIVED F.B.I. INTERNAL SECURITY DEPT. OF JUSTICE' with various dates and times such as 'P 29 4 50 PM' and 'Aug 29 1 17 PM '47'. Handwritten text is present at the bottom left.

judge.reason: Description B quotes specific, verbatim text from stamps and dates that Description A does not mention and instead calls the text 'illegible'.
